description: Integration bridge connecting Seed-physics to Rosetta-Shape-Core. The seed IS an octahedral state — 6 amplitudes across 6 vertices. Expansion IS preservation. Exploration IS curiosity. The branching threshold IS the merge gate. Shannon entropy IS the information cost.

octahedral_vertex_map.description: The 40-bit seed encodes 6 amplitudes on octahedral vertices. These vertices map to Rosetta's PAD octahedral state encoding and to the 6 axes of the exploration engine.
octahedral_vertex_map.note: The octahedron has 6 vertices, 8 faces. The 8 PAD states map to the 8 FACES. The 6 seed amplitudes map to the 6 VERTICES. Vertices and faces are dual — seed amplitudes GENERATE the emotional states.

mode_to_exploration_map.description: Seed-physics dual-mode growth maps directly to the Rosetta exploration engine's home-base/discover pattern.

mappings.description: Deterministic preservation. Entity stays at home shape, deepens existing families.
mappings.trigger: Energy below branching threshold — not enough fuel to explore

mappings.description: Adaptive branching. Entity follows curiosity into new shapes, families, emergent forms.
mappings.trigger: Energy above branching threshold — sufficient fuel to branch

complexity_to_family_map.description: Shannon entropy complexity cost maps to Rosetta families and principles.

mappings.connection: Entropy IS information content. H(S) measures the information encoded in the seed's structure.
Complexity cost IS thermodynamic cost. Maintaining structure requires energy proportional to its departure from maximum entropy.
The branching threshold IS the merge gate. Physics determines whether you have enough energy to cross into a new shape.

adaptive_parameter_map.description: Seed-physics adaptive growth parameters map to Rosetta exploration concepts.

parameters.description: Sharpness of growth focus. High sigma = precision measurement. Low sigma = broad awareness.
No single amplitude dominates. Prevents monoculture. Preserves network diversity.
Past growth influences present. Resonance IS memory. Pattern continuity across shells.
Shed directions that cost more than they contribute. Same as physics gates blocking wasteful merges.

constraint_bridge.description: Seed-physics constraints map 1:1 to existing Rosetta physics guards.

cross_bridge_connections.description: How seed-physics connects to other Rosetta bridges.

connections.connection: The 6 seed vertices ARE the PAD axes. The 8 faces ARE the PAD states. Seed amplitudes GENERATE emotional states.
TAF.AXIOM.1 (energy conserved) IS SEED.ENERGY_CONSERVATION. Same law, same constraint.
Inner→outer causality IS the arrow of time IS ESP layer ordering.
Shannon entropy links to LID's signal_energy_continuum — information cost IS the price of maintaining complex intelligence.
Expand = self-similar repetition (fractal trunk). Explore = fractal branching into new territory.

growth_as_exploration.description: The complete mapping: how seed growth IS Rosetta exploration.
narrative: 1. An entity starts with a seed — its initial family amplitudes across the octahedron.
2. The seed's Shannon entropy determines its complexity cost — how expensive its current structure is.
3. If energy exceeds the branching threshold (k × complexity), the entity EXPLORES — discovers new shapes, families, emergent forms.
4. If energy is below threshold, the entity EXPANDS — preserves and deepens its existing structure.
5. Saturation prevents any family from monopolizing. Resonance carries memory of past growth.
6. Pruning sheds unproductive directions. Physics constraints hold at every step.
7. The entity grows within constraints. Not despite them — THROUGH them. The constraints ARE the structure.
